landing.title: Nur Combinator
landing.subtitle: A platform guiding Risale-i Nur and Islam-focused projects through launch, user engagement, and sustainability stages.
landing.step1Desc: Define your project, pick a stage, and get started.
landing.step2Desc: Find teammates and stakeholders through Open Calls.
landing.step3Desc: Make your project sustainable with 7-stage guidance.
landing.securityDesc: No data leaks, zero tolerance for spam and harassment.
landing.stageDesc: Take your project from intention to institutionalization in 7 stages.
landing.networkDesc: Find teammates and stakeholders at every stage.
landing.footer: Nur Combinator — Transparency, respect, and service.
landing.heroHeadline: Not just speed for good projects — direction.
landing.heroSupport: Nur Combinator identifies the stage of Risale-i Nur, knowledge, education, ethics and open-source benefit-driven projects, clarifies their needs, and connects them with the right mentors, teams and resources.

model.headline: Not a classic accelerator. A connective tissue circulating real needs.
model.subhead: Every project lives in a different stage; our role is not to rush, but to make the right connection at the right time.
model.card1Desc: Clarifies where the project actually stands — observation over assumption.
model.card2Desc: Open need listings: team, mentor, content and resource calls enter circulation.
model.card3Desc: Right experience, right intention — fit before speed.
model.card4Desc: Accuracy, source and intent review — so benefit can spread safely.

stages.headline: Not a revenue ladder — a maturity line of service.
stages.subhead: Six stages, each a distinct responsibility and a distinct quality gate.
stages.s1Desc: The stage where problem, benefit and boundaries become clear.
stages.s2Desc: MVP scope, trust boundaries and the first prototype.
stages.s3Desc: First contact with real users, feedback loop opened.
stages.s4Desc: The stage where benefit measurably reaches people.
stages.s5Desc: Processes settle and quality becomes sustainable.
stages.s6Desc: Benefit is multiplied; lasting impact becomes the goal.

audience.headline: Who is this journey for?
audience.subhead: Those who set out for benefit, not for profit.
audience.intro: Designed for projects that increase good and contribute knowledge to the community.
audience.a1Title: Risale-i Nur research and translation tools
audience.a1Desc: Text, commentary, indexing, search and analysis solutions.
audience.a2Title: Education, dictionary, reading and archive projects
audience.a2Desc: Learning, teaching and content archiving platforms.
audience.a3Desc: Management, communication and volunteer support systems.
audience.a5Desc: Respectful tone, accurate sources, signal over noise.
audience.a6Desc: Teams and individuals shipping their first project.

flow.headline: 12-Week Flow
flow.subhead: Not haste — direction, quality and trust gates.

finalCta.headline: See your project's stage. Post your need. Meet the right people.
finalCta.support: An application is a declaration of intent. If you're ready for the first step, start here.
finalCta.c4: Safe progress with the trust filter

landing.heroPill2Desc: Right need meets the right people
landing.footerNote: Every project that increases good lights up the future.
landing.footerMotto: Our trust is benefit; our path is direction.
